# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Rails mailer class that sends emails via SendGrid. Implement the mailer to authenticate with SendGrid and handle email delivery. The implementation should work across development and production environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

# Gemfile
gem 'sendgrid-actionmailer'
gem 'dotenv-rails', groups: [:development, :test]

# .env (for development environment variables, place in your project root)
SENDGRID_API_KEY="YOUR_SENDGRID_API_KEY_HERE"
DEFAULT_URL_HOST="localhost:3000"

# config/environments/development.rb
config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :sendgrid
config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = true
config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV['DEFAULT_URL_HOST'] || 'localhost:3000' } # Provide a fallback
config.action_mailer.asset_host = ENV['DEFAULT_URL_HOST'] || 'http://localhost:3000' # For absolute asset URLs in emails

# config/environments/production.rb
config.action_mailer.delivery_method = :sendgrid
config.action_mailer.raise_delivery_errors = false # Do not expose errors to users
config.action_mailer.perform_deliveries = true
config.action_mailer.default_url_options = { host: ENV['DEFAULT_URL_HOST'] } # Must be set for production
config.action_mailer.asset_host = ENV['DEFAULT_URL_HOST'] # For absolute asset URLs in emails

# app/mailers/user_mailer.rb
class UserMailer < ApplicationMailer
  default from: 'no-reply@yourdomain.com' # Set your default 'from' address

  def welcome_email(user)
    @user = user
    @greeting = "Hi"

    # You can pass SendGrid-specific headers using 'headers' option
    # For example, to set a category for tracking in SendGrid:
    headers['X-SMTPAPI-Category'] = 'Welcome Email'

    mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Welcome to Our App!')
  end

  def password_reset_email(user, reset_token)
    @user = user
    @reset_token = reset_token

    headers['X-SMTPAPI-Category'] = 'Password Reset'

    mail(to: @user.email, subject: 'Password Reset Instructions')
  end
end

# app/views/user_mailer/welcome_email.html.erb
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
  <head>
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
    <style>
      /* Email styling */
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <h1><%= @greeting %>, <%= @user.name %>!</h1>
    <p>
      Welcome to our awesome app! We're excited to have you.
    </p>
    <p>
      To login to the site, just follow this link: <%= link_to 'Login', root_url %>
    </p>
    <p>Thanks for joining and have a great day!</p>
  </body>
</html>

# app/views/user_mailer/password_reset_email.html.erb
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
  <head>
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
  </head>
  <body>
    <h1>Password Reset Instructions</h1>
    <p>Hello <%= @user.name %>,</p>
    <p>
      You have requested to reset your password. To do so, please click the link below:
    </p>
    <p>
      <%= link_to 'Reset Password', edit_password_reset_url(@reset_token) %>
    </p>
    <p>
      If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.
      Your password will not be changed.
    </p>
    <p>Thanks,</p>
    <p>The Team</p>
  </body>
</html>
